title: Unify prompt-box media roles — collection model, kill startFrame/endFrame special-casing
description:
BUG (repro'd, project 'Test Chips', 2026-07-17): a krea2Edit with TWO reference images loses chip #1 on project-page round-trip (only chip #2 survives) and reuse-prompt loads only 1 chip. ROOT CAUSE: routes/projects.js `_snapshotRoleForMediaItem` (~L617) HARDCODES startFrame/endFrame roles BY INDEX on any snapshotted input image (an i2v leftover from MPI-227). It OVERWRITES krea2Edit's real slot roles (inputImage/inputImage2, from commandRegistry.krea2Edit.mediaInputs) with startFrame/endFrame in the sidecar (materializeGenerationFrameSnapshots L646+L665-667). Confirmed in the live sidecar Media/.meta/af83dcbf-....json: both images saved but tagged role:startFrame / role:endFrame instead of inputImage/inputImage2. On restore, MpiPromptBox `_withAssignedRoles` (L211) explicit role-match fails (op slots are inputImage/inputImage2, chips carry startFrame/endFrame) -> positional fallback + at-cap eviction drops chip 1. On reuse, promptReuse.js `_mediaItemsFromPreviewAssets` filters role==='startFrame'||'endFrame' (L74) -> the merge/role collision collapses the pair to 1.

GOAL: make the snapshot/restore/reuse plumbing ROLE-AGNOSTIC. The generic infrastructure must NOT special-case two specific slot keys. Persist whatever role the chip already has (assigned from the op's mediaInputs slot.key), drop the index->frame-role hardcode entirely. Then krea2Edit inputImage/inputImage2 just work, i2v startFrame/endFrame keep working (they stay as i2v's own slot KEYS, not infra specials), and future multi-image ops work free.

DIRECTION (user, 2026-07-17): move toward a COLLECTION model for prompt-box media — an `images: [...]` list (each item carrying its own optional semantic tag where injection needs it: inputImage / startFrame / none), positional index = array order — NOT enumerated image1/image2/imageN slots. Rationale: video will soon accept MORE than 2 images (used in different generation areas), so startFrame/endFrame semantic role names don't scale. Two systems fighting today (positional 'which slot' vs semantic 'what the frame means'); unify the positional part. Do NOT rename i2v's startFrame/endFrame slot KEYS in this pass (that's a bigger semantic migration — do it when multi-image video actually lands); just stop the generic plumbing from special-casing them.

MIGRATION DECISION NEEDED: existing sidecars already have mis-tagged startFrame/endFrame roles on edit/i2i cards. Decide: (a) one-time migration rewriting those roles to the op's declared slot keys, or (b) role-agnostic restore/reuse that tolerates any role so old sidecars still restore. Prefer fixing at source + a light migration.

BLAST RADIUS (cross-cutting — save + restore + reuse + validate): routes/projects.js (_snapshotRoleForMediaItem, materializeGenerationFrameSnapshots, materializePreviewAssets snapshot gate L569, validate-preview-assets L1254+, _snapshotRoleForMediaItem callers), js/components/Organisms/MpiPromptBox/MpiPromptBox.js (_withAssignedRoles L211, _saveMedia L116, restore loop L1517, injectMedia cap/eviction L316-357), js/utils/promptReuse.js (_mediaItemsFromPreviewAssets L68 role filter, _mergeReuseMedia L162, _previewAssetMediaItems), js/services/generationService.js (frozenMediaItems L887, snapshot role filter L923). Rules: .claude/rules/comfy_injection.md (media-slot completeness, filterMediaInputsForModel), [[feedback_media_injection_path_to_string]]. Related shipped: MPI-292 (2-image edit), MPI-227 (content-addressed preview-assets), MPI-225 (op-scoped media items).

STILL TO CONFIRM (step 1 of plan): trace the REUSE symptom to certainty — exactly where the 2nd image drops on reuse (the round-trip symptom is fully traced; reuse is inferred). Also decide the collection data-shape (array of {url, role?, ...}) and how injection maps array order -> Input_Image/Input_Image_2 titles in commandExecutor _buildParams.
activeSessionTitle: MPI-295 — role-agnostic media plumbing (validating; Wan i2v e2e pending workflow sync)
